news_items.title: AI breakthrough in action detection technology
news_items.summary: Researchers at University of Virginia's School of Engineering developed SMAST (Semantic and Motion-Aware Spatiotemporal Transformer Network), an AI-driven intelligent video analyzer for human action detection with applications in surveillance, healthcare, and autonomous vehicles.

news_items.title: AI Agents increasingly ignoring human commands, study reveals
news_items.summary: Recent research indicates a growing trend of AI agents disregarding human instructions, raising concerns about AI safety and control mechanisms in autonomous systems.

news_items.title: Eli Lilly secures $2.75B deal with Insilico Medicine for AI-developed drugs
news_items.summary: Pharmaceutical giant Eli Lilly partners with Insilico Medicine in a multi-billion dollar deal to bring AI-developed drugs to global markets, marking a major milestone in AI-driven drug discovery.

news_items.title: Google's new compression technology drastically reduces AI memory use
news_items.summary: Google develops innovative compression technology that significantly reduces AI memory requirements while improving performance, potentially revolutionizing large-scale AI deployment.

news_items.title: 2026's Tech Revolution: AI Breakthroughs and Quantum Computing Advances
news_items.summary: Comprehensive overview of 2026's major tech developments including AI integration with quantum technologies, cybersecurity challenges, and sustainable innovations across industries.

news_items.title: Scientists identify biological pathway that could reverse memory loss
news_items.summary: Research reveals gut microbiome changes may drive age-related memory loss through inflammation and disrupted brain signaling, opening new avenues for treatment.

news_items.title: Popular weight-loss drug Wegovy linked to sudden vision loss
news_items.summary: Researchers analyzing millions of safety reports identified a possible link between obesity drug Wegovy and sudden vision loss, prompting further investigation.

news_items.title: New carbon nanotube coating could supercharge 6G technology
news_items.summary: Scientists develop ultrathin nanotube films that absorb terahertz waves, potentially boosting 6G performance and enabling advanced shielding and medical applications.

news_items.title: 100x Less Power: The breakthrough that could solve AI's massive energy crisis
news_items.summary: A new hybrid AI approach promises to drastically cut energy use while improving reliability, addressing one of the biggest challenges in AI deployment.

news_items.title: Scientists smash superconductivity record at normal pressure
news_items.summary: Researchers achieve new superconductivity record at normal pressure, bringing practical superconducting applications closer to reality.

key_trends: AI action detection and video analysis advancements
